name: hs-ti
description: 云瞻威胁情报查询技能。查询IP地址、域名、URL、文件哈希等是否在云瞻威胁情报库中。支持中英文双语。/ Hillstone Threat Intelligence Skill. Query IP addresses, domains, URLs, and file hashes in the Hillstone threat intelligence database. Supports Chinese/English bilingual.

config.description: 云瞻威胁情报API配置文件 / Hillstone Threat Intelligence API configuration file

api_key.description: 云瞻威胁情报API密钥 / Hillstone Threat Intelligence API Key

api_url.description: 云瞻威胁情报API地址 / Hillstone Threat Intelligence API URL

timeout.description: 请求超时时间（秒）/ Request timeout in seconds

max_retries.description: 最大重试次数 / Maximum retry attempts

retry_delay.description: 重试延迟（秒）/ Retry delay in seconds

cache_enabled.description: 是否启用缓存 / Enable caching

cache_ttl.description: 缓存有效期（秒）/ Cache time-to-live in seconds

max_workers.description: 并发查询最大线程数 / Maximum concurrent query threads

author: Hillstone

endpoints.name: 云瞻威胁情报API / Hillstone Threat Intelligence API
endpoints.description: 用于查询IP、域名、URL、文件哈希的威胁情报 / Used to query threat intelligence for IPs, domains, URLs, and file hashes
